mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM c7d2503t1p1.receipts WHERE file_hash = #{fileHash}
SELECT * FROM c7d2503t1p1.receipts ORDER BY upload_id DESC

sql.if: AND (m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR r.ocr_store LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))

mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM receipts r JOIN member m ON r.member_idx = m.member_idx
